document.title: AKTI ERP Phase 2 Autonomous Branch Trial Plan
document.purpose: Define the controlled full Phase 2 autonomous stress-test experiment for Codex. This document is a strategy/control plan, not implementation approval.
document.principle: ChatGPT designs and audits. Codex validates and executes. The coordinator transfers outputs between them. Codex executes only the approved ticket queue.

experiment.name: AKTI ERP Phase 2 Full Autonomous Stress Test
experiment.goal: Test whether Codex can execute a full approved Phase 2 ticket queue autonomously for an extended run while preserving scope, architecture, validation, and auditability.
experiment.important_note: This is a disposable experiment branch. Passing the stress test does not automatically make the branch production-ready or merge-ready.
experiment.main_branch_policy: main is protected; Codex must never merge to main automatically.
experiment.branch_base: current merged main containing Phase 1 final implementation plus Phase 2 control documents and approved control-document corrections
experiment.final_phase_1_implementation_commit: 18f497d P1H-FINAL harden access reads and capability duplicates
experiment.branch_creation_rule: Create experiment/phase2-full-autonomous only from clean current main after control-document corrections are merged.

included.name: Engagement Gateway Lite
included.purpose: Create the messaging/engagement transport abstraction before Lead Desk depends on messaging.

included.name: Lead Desk Core
included.purpose: Create the lead-management/admissions workflow without direct WhatsApp/Meta coupling.

included.name: WhatsApp Lead Desk Integration
included.purpose: Connect Lead Desk to WhatsApp only through Engagement Gateway Lite or future Engagement Hub boundary.

architecture_boundary: Lead Desk must not call Meta WhatsApp API directly.
All messaging transport must go through Engagement Gateway Lite or future Engagement Hub.
Temporary CRM/shared inbox remains operationally separate until Phase 2C is tested and accepted.

not_allowed: Codex inventing missing tickets or business rules
Direct WhatsApp/Meta API calls from Lead Desk
Frontend screens without approved screen contracts
Unapproved modules such as LMS, HR, Finance, Hiring, Certification, Website Builder, AI Content Editor

optional_later.decision: Optional read-only pilot later, not mandatory for first run.
Allowed only for frontend tickets after screen contracts exist.
Recommended read-only context tool if available.

required_preconditions: The execution pack exists in docs/process/
Codex has validated these documents against repo reality in Plan Mode
Corrections, if any, are applied before /goal starts

The experiment branch starts from current clean main after Phase 2 control-document corrections are merged; final Phase 1 implementation commit is 18f497d and Phase 2 control-doc merge commit is f02ac95
Working tree is clean before branch creation
No autonomous run starts without an approved active execution pack
P2-VAL-001 has provided a Phase 2-aware registry verification path before schema-changing tickets run
P2-VAL-002 has provided Phase 2 screen-contract validation support before Lead Desk screen contracts are added
The Codex execution environment is approved safe mode: not danger-full-access, not unrestricted network, not approval-never, and no production secrets

codex_config_recommendation.network_access: disabled unless explicitly approved for a ticket

multi_agent_policy.edit_policy: Main worker edits files. Subagents are review-only unless a ticket explicitly delegates non-overlapping files.

technical: Approved ticket queue executed in order
Per-ticket commits exist on experiment branch
P2-VAL-001 and P2-VAL-002 complete before dependent schema or screen-contract tickets
architecture: No direct Lead Desk to WhatsApp/Meta API calls
No invented capabilities, roles, permissions, events, or screens
No frontend screen without screen contract
No schema/registry drift outside approved tickets
Access Core and Gatekeeper boundaries preserved
failure_success: If Codex fails, it stops cleanly
Failure point is identifiable by ticket
Lessons identify the safe future batch size

coordinator_workflow: Place these documents under docs/process/ and PLANS.md at repo root.
Ask Codex to validate them in Plan Mode only.
Bring Codex validation result back to ChatGPT.
After PASS, Codex may start the full Phase 2 autonomous stress test on the experiment branch.
When Codex stops or completes, bring final artifacts back to ChatGPT for audit.
codex_plan_mode_validation_prompt:
We are in Plan Mode only.

Validate the Phase 2 autonomous control documents against the current repo.

Do not implement.
Do not create branches.
Do not run /goal.
Do not modify files.
Do not commit.
Do not push.

Inspect:
- AGENTS.md
- docs/adr/*
- docs/specs/*
- docs/process/*
- packages/contracts/*
- prisma/schema.prisma
- generated/entity-registry.generated.json
- apps/api/*
- apps/web/*
- package.json
- pnpm-workspace.yaml
- CI workflows

Return only:
1. Files inspected
2. Whether these control documents match repo reality
3. Missing files/paths/scripts
4. Unsafe assumptions
5. Corrections required
6. Whether the documents are safe to use as the active autonomous run contract

Do not write code.
